description: Numerical tolerances for cross-impl conformance. Per `spec/algorithms/topsis.md` §7.
legacyBaselineNote: Where conformance/expected/*.json files were produced from the legacy .NET console, tolerances against legacy are 1e-6 absolute on scalar score; ranking matches exactly under the spec tie-break rule (`alternativeIds` lexicographic). Legacy ranking with native LINQ enumeration order is not portable and is NOT a conformance target.
